title: Quality-gate failure record (build-failure)
description: Appended by feature-implementer when the quality gate (make ci) fails. The coordinator reads the latest build-failure record per req_id to decide between retry (retry < 3) and SDE escalation (retry == 3). Append-only; failures are not deleted on success — instead, a build-pass record is appended so the retry trail survives in the file.

retry.description: Retry counter for this design cycle. 1 on the first failure, increments on each subsequent failure. Resets to 1 after a design-block record with verdict=revised.

failed_check.description: Which step of the quality gate failed.

error_output.description: Full error output from the failing command. Multi-line strings are fine; JSONL preserves newlines as \n.

attempted.description: Brief description of the change the implementer made before the failure surfaced.
